name: SwordBounce
short_description: Platform your way through over 150 ever more challenging rooms with your trusty sword in hand! Use obstacles to your advantage and traverse the treacherous depths.
detailed_description:
SwordBounce is a linear pixel art puzzle platformer in which you find a mystical sword you can use to bounce on the obstacles in your path. Spike Traps and Bullets that would decimate an average explorer in an instant are no match for the sword's bouncing capabilities! You'll also find upgrades to the sword that make it even more useful when exploring and solving puzzles. The finely-tuned precision platforming makes conquering the unknown feel fair, yet challenging. Delve Deep and Don't Give Up!



After waking up in a strange place, you venture downward into the dreary depths to discover the mysteries of these seemingly forgotten passageways.

FEATURES

  • Over 150 Challenging Levels to Solve
  • Finely-Tuned Precision Platforming
  • 10 Secrets to Discover
  • 10 Color Palettes to Unlock
  • 4 Upgrades to Collect
  • 4 Color Minimalist Styled Pixel Art
